explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to text describing events, processes, or activities that are occurring, scheduled, or being implemented (such as events “taking place,” ceremonies “hosted” by someone, initiatives “rolling out” across regions, or official proceedings like investigations and appointments).

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears across diverse domains including business processes, sports tournaments, political meetings, natural disasters, product launches, and cultural events. It is present in multiple languages (English, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Hindi, Arabic) and typically occurs in news reports, press releases, or descriptive passages that detail happenings with specific temporal or locative context.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: High-activation texts consistently feature dynamic verbs or verb phrases indicating occurrence (e.g., “takes place,” “hosted,” “rolling out,” “ocurrió,” “appointment,” “release”) and often include details like dates, locations, or percentages. Low-activation texts are more static—including headlines, hypothetical statements, simple announcements without process details, or general descriptions—lacking the same sense of an unfolding event or action.

4. **Closing interpretation**: The neuron detects semantic content centered on events happening in time, focusing on actions, processes, and scheduled occurrences rather than states, definitions, or hypothetical scenarios.

results.plain_text: वरिष्ठ संवाददाता, नई दिल्ली जेनरेटर पर रोक के बाद दिल्ली में शादी बेहद मुश्किल हो गई है। टेंट हाउस ओनर्स का कहना है कि लोगों पर करीब 5000-10 हजार रुपये तक अतिरिक्त बोझ बढ़ गया है। मोतिया खान, आराम बाग और एमसीडी के कुछ इलाकों में जिन लोगों ने शादियों का आयोजन किया था, उनका कहना है कि शादी समारोह में कई बार बिजली गुल हो गई थी और इस दौरान उन्हें जेनरेटर के सहारे शादी समारोह को जारी रखना पड़ा। इस बीच कई सरकारी कर्मचारी आए और जेनरेटर चलाने को लेकर उन्हें परेशान करने लगे। टेंट हाउस ओनर्स पर जुर्माना लगाया गया। टेंट हाउस ओनर्स जुर्माने का पैसे लड़की वालों को ही भरने को कह रहे हैं। विशंभर टेंट हाउस के मालिक का कहना है कि जेनरेटर पर रोक लगाई गई है, लेकिन इसके बिना शादी के आयोजन की कल्पना नहीं की जा सकती। इससे टेंट ऑपरेटर्स और शादी आयोजन करने वाली पार्टियां दोनों परेशान हैं। शादी समारोह के दौरान किसी भी विभाग के सरकारी अफसर धमक आते हैं और समारोह में खलल डाल देते हैं। गोल मार्केट स्थित सनी टेंट हाउस के ओनर्स धर्मपाल का कहना है कि एनडीएमसी एरिया में जेनरेटर की जरूरत नहीं है। एनडीएमसी टेंट हाउस ओनर्स को शादी के नाम पर असानी से टेंपररी कनेक्शन दे रहा है। इससे शादी करने वालों पर अतिरिक्त फाइनैंशल बोझ बढ़ गया है। गोल मार्केट स्थित एक दूसरे टेंट हाउस ओनर्स का कहना है कि एनडीएमसी शादी समारोह के लिए टेंपररी कनेक्शन तो दे रहा है, लेकिन इसके लिए 5000 रुपये सिक्यॉरिटी चार्ज और 400 रुपये बिजली के लिए चार्ज कर रहा है। जेनरेटर पर रोक लगने से 5-10 हजार रुपये अतिरिक्त बोझ शादी करने वालों पर बढ़ गया है।

results.actual_text: received snow or rain on Saturday. South Korea’s safety agency said that Saturday’s snow in Seoul and other areas caused traffic congestion, but no snowfall-related deaths
results.plain_text: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — The South Korean capital, Seoul, received the biggest single-day snowfall recorded in December for more than 40 years on Saturday but there have been no reports of any weather-related deaths or injuries.  The country’s weather agency said Sunday that 12.2 centimeters (4.8 inches) of snow fell on Seoul the previous day, the heaviest since 1981. The Korea Meteorological Administration said a heavy snow advisory was issued for Seoul’s entire area on Saturday before it was lifted later in the day. It said other parts of South Korea also received snow or rain on Saturday.  South Korea’s safety agency said that Saturday’s snow in Seoul and other areas caused traffic congestion, but no snowfall-related deaths or injuries have been reported.

predictions.text: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — The South Korean capital, Seoul, received the biggest single-day snowfall recorded in December for more than 40 years on Saturday but there have been no reports of any weather-related deaths or injuries.
predictions.reasoning: This section announces the occurrence of a record snowfall event with specific temporal details, matching the neuron's focus on events taking place.

results.actual_text: 350 officials were either demoted or fired for alleged involvement in the sale of improperly stored or expired vaccines, the State Council said.
results.plain_text: Drug authorities in East China's Shandong Province said on Saturday that they had called back some vaccines that were alleged to be below normal standards. The provincial food and drug administration reported that they called back 252,600 doses of DPT vaccine at the request of the national food and drug administration, The Beijing News reported on Sunday. "The medicines are safe, but their potency doesn't meet standards. So, some children injected with the low-dosage vaccines have to get auxiliary injections, Liang Xiaofeng, a deputy director of Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention, told the Global Times on Sunday.  A Shandong Food and Drug Administration official said they have not found any problems arising from these vaccines so far, The Beijing News reported.  A report from the National Institute for Food and Drug Control showed that two supplies of DPT vaccine, 650,000 doses in all, were found to be below normal standard in potency during a sample inspection, the Food and Drug Administration of China announced on Friday, according to the Xinhua News Agency. The vaccines were produced by companies in the cities of Changchun in Northeast China's Jilin Province and Wuhan in Central China's Hubei Province in 2016. One supply of 252,600 vaccines was obtained by the Shandong Center for Disease Control and Prevention, and the other, of 400,520, went to Southwest China's Chongqing Municipality and North China's Hebei Province, The Beijing News reported. The Food and Drug Administration of China has ordered the companies to take back the vaccines and stop using below-quality products. Liang said that companies that produce the vaccines need to be more responsible since the National Institute for Food and Drug Control only does spot inspections of vaccines and told the authorities that they need to do more inspections.  One vaccine scandal back in March 2016 in China found that some improperly stored or out-of-date vaccines, worth 310 million yuan ($47.8 million), had allegedly been selling across more than 20 provinces and regions since 2011. In the case, more than 350 officials were either demoted or fired for alleged involvement in the sale of improperly stored or expired vaccines, the State Council said.

"The medicines are safe, but their potency doesn't meet standards. So, some children injected with the low-dosage vaccines have to get auxiliary injections, Liang Xiaofeng, a deputy director of Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention, told the Global Times on Sunday.

results.actual_text: On the successful launch of ISRO’s XPoSat mission, Satish Dhawan
results.plain_text: On the successful launch of ISRO’s XPoSat mission, Satish Dhawan Space Center Director Rajarajan shared details and said the mission is to study the stars near the black holes. He said, “XPoSat mission is to study the stars near the black holes...It is scientific inquisitiveness to know how more about the Universe.” ISRO’s PSLV-C58 Mission is to launch XPoSat Satellite into an Eastward low inclination orbit. After injection of XPoSat, the PS4 stage will be re-started twice to reduce the orbit into 350 km circular orbit to maintain in 3-axis stabilized mode for Orbital Platform (OP) experiments. The objective of the mission is to measure polarisation of X-rays in the energy band 8-30keV emanating from about 50 potential cosmic sources through Thomson Scattering by POLIX payload. The PSLV Orbital Experimental Module-3 (POEM-3) experiment will be executed meeting the objective of 10 identified payloads, supplied by ISRO and IN-SPACe. The XPoSat (X-ray Polarimeter Satellite) is India's first dedicated polarimetry mission to study various dynamics of bright astronomical X-ray sources in extreme conditions.

predictions.text: ISRO’s PSLV-C58 Mission is to launch XPoSat Satellite into an Eastward low inclination orbit. After injection of XPoSat, the PS4 stage will be re-started twice to reduce the orbit into 350 km circular orbit to maintain in 3-axis stabilized mode for Orbital Platform (OP) experiments.
predictions.reasoning: This section describes the planned launch and orbital maneuvers, featuring dynamic verbs and technical details that match the neuron's focus on scheduled processes and actions.

results.actual_text: CCTV: Police search for men involved in violent Fitzroy fight Detectives
results.plain_text: CCTV: Police search for men involved in violent Fitzroy fight  Detectives have released CCTV footage following a violent bar fight in Fitzroy last month.  Police say a man approached three other men inside a Brunswick Street venue when a verbal dispute and scuffle took place about 12.40am on Sunday 10 February.  The fight continued outside the venue, resulting in two male victims’, both aged 22 from Greensborough and Ivanhoe, being struck to their heads with beer bottles.  The pair received cuts to their heads and another victim, a 23-year-old from Altona Meadows, was hit in the face by an unknown offender as he left.  He fell to the ground and suffered a cut to the lip.  Two of the injured men received first aid at the venue.  Police have released images of five men who they believe may be able to assist with their investigation.  Click PLAY on the video below  Anyone who may have witnessed the incident or with any information is urged to contact Crime Stoppers on 1800 333 000 or submit a confidential crime report online at www.crimestoppersvic.com.au

The pair received cuts to their heads and another victim, a 23-year-old from Altona Meadows, was hit in the face by an unknown offender as he left. He fell to the ground and suffered a cut to the lip.
predictions.reasoning: This section describes the unfolding of a violent fight and resulting injuries with dynamic verbs and specific details, matching the neuron's focus on events occurring.
